overview: Wingfoot Wellness & Hormones provides comprehensive management of health challenges including weight loss, autoimmune diseases, hormone replacement therapy, and aesthetics. The clinic uses a customized approach to identify underlying metabolic and hormonal factors and develop individualized care plans.
highlights: In-office labs with negotiated LabCorp rates for cash pay patients
Customized weight loss programs identifying metabolic roadblocks
Practitioner follow-up within 24-48 hours of initial visit
targetAudience: Patients seeking answers for complex or chronic health conditions, particularly those frustrated by standard care that dismissed their symptoms.
